title: crotalaria brevis
intro: Crotalaria brevis, also known as the short rattlebox, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria brevis include the potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria brevis can be made by infusing the leaves or roots in water, and it is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
